nasb.text: Would, therefore, that this people were under my authority! Then I would remove Abimelech.” And he said to Abimelech, “Increase your army and come out.”

esv.text: Would that this people were under my hand! Then I would remove Abimelech. I would say to Abimelech, ‘Increase your army, and come out.’”

cnv.text: 但願這些人民都歸在我手下，我好把亞比米勒除掉。”迦勒又對亞比米勒說：“增添你的軍隊出來吧！”

ccb.text: 要是这百姓归我领导就好了！我会除掉亚比米勒，我会挑战他召集全军来战。”
